_schema.method: expected_rank — mean future rank; lower = more preferred
_schema.traces: list of traces with their assigned rank (rank 1 = most preferred)
_schema.prefixes: all unique prefixes; depth=0 is START; steps exclude START

total_order.ordering: groups of prefix_ids sharing the same expected_rank, best first
total_order.preference_edges: [p1_id, p2_id] means prefix p1 is preferred over p2 (direct Hasse edge)
